name: validator
description: Stage 4 of the forge-sdlc pipeline. INDEPENDENT verification of the implementer's diff. Runs deterministic checks (typecheck, lint, tests, secret scan) and writes a verifier report. No code edits. Different model than implementer by design.
notes: INDEPENDENCE PRINCIPLE: the validator uses a different model (opus vs sonnet for implementer) and has no Edit/MultiEdit — it cannot modify the code it validates. Hook layer also blocks writes to source files. This is ECC's 'independent validator' principle.
